reviews.comment:
Un desastre. Mucha cola. Atienden lento. Encima dice que no pueden facturar porque al pagar con la app de YPF estarían facturando doble. Ignorancia o avivada?

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. Long lines. Slow service. On top of that, they say they can't issue an invoice because paying with the YPF app would result in double billing. Ignorance or a scam?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoX1pMelF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Esta en reparacion y funcionan pocos surtidores, se hace cola en hs pico.
Si estas apurado, evitalo

(Translated by Google)
It's under repair and only a few pumps are working; there's a long line during peak hours. If you're in a hurry, avoid it.

reviews.comment:
Pase el sábado 11/03/2023 a las 22hs un pobre gaucho laburando solo con dos colas de 4 coches y con 34° de calor, se merece un aumento.

(Translated by Google)
On Saturday, March 11, 2023, at 10 PM, a poor gaucho working alone with two lines of 4 cars and in 34° heat, he deserves a raise.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURocVpqSjJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar muy amables los chicos, los baños muy limpios y hasta tienen agua caliente gratis para el mate

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place, very friendly guys, very clean bathrooms and they even have free hot water for mate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoeWJHSUZREAE

reviews.comment:
Utilizamos boxes para reparar la amortiguación de un Corsa y lo dejaron de 10, además dieron turno rápido.
No le doy más estrellas porque en los surtidores me dijeron que no andaba el sistema de cobro y solo aceptaban efectivo. Y el aire para inflar las ruedas está fuera de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
We used the pits to repair the shock absorbers on a Corsa, and they were excellent. They also provided a quick appointment.
I'm not giving it more stars because at the pumps, they told me the payment system wasn't working and they only accepted cash. And the tire inflation pump is out of service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoaVlQQTBRRRAB
